summary: Completed frontend UI testing for 4 new features: Theme Templates, Watermarks, Custom Fonts, and Password Protection. All features verified as working correctly.

feature_1_theme_templates: PASS: Customize button appears on hover over preset theme in Chart Studio
PASS: Clicking Customize opens Theme Builder dialog
PASS: Theme name auto-generated as 'Custom [Preset Name]' (e.g., 'Custom Violet Dreams')
PASS: Colors are pre-filled from the preset theme
PASS: Color Palette shows 5/8 colors with preview gradient
feature_2_watermarks: PASS: Watermark section visible in Report Builder settings panel
PASS: Watermark toggle enables/disables watermark settings
PASS: Watermark type selection (Text/Image) buttons work
PASS: Watermark text input found and accepts text
PASS: Watermark presets (CONFIDENTIAL, DRAFT, COPY) visible
PASS: Watermark position dropdown (Center, Diagonal, Corner) found
PASS: Watermark opacity slider (10-100%) found with current value 30%
feature_3_custom_fonts: PASS: Typography section visible in Report Builder settings
PASS: Font Family dropdown found with 8 options
PASS: Font options: Inter (Modern), Roboto (Clean), Playfair Display (Elegant), Montserrat (Professional), Open Sans (Readable), Lato (Friendly), Merriweather (Classic), Source Sans Pro (Technical)
PASS: Font Size buttons found - Small/Compact, Medium/Default, Large/Readable
feature_4_password_protection: PASS: Password Protection section visible in Report Builder settings
PASS: 'PDF Only' badge visible next to section header
PASS: Password Protection toggle found and works
PASS: Password input field appears when toggle is enabled
PASS: Password input has placeholder 'Min 6 characters'

context_for_next_testing_agent: 4 new features fully tested and working: 1) Theme Templates - Customize button on preset themes in Chart Studio opens Theme Builder with pre-filled colors and auto-generated name. 2) Watermarks - Full controls in Report Builder including type selection (Text/Image), text input with presets (CONFIDENTIAL, DRAFT, COPY), position dropdown, opacity slider. 3) Custom Fonts - Typography section with 8 Google Font options (Inter, Roboto, Playfair Display, Montserrat, Open Sans, Lato, Merriweather, Source Sans Pro) and 3 size presets (Small/Compact, Medium/Default, Large/Readable). 4) Password Protection - PDF Only badge, toggle, and password input field with min 6 char requirement. All features accessible via Report Builder page at /report-builder.
